title: Checkout returns 500 when coupon is expired
body: Production checkout fails with an exception when users apply an expired coupon.

title: Potential token leak in reset password logs
body: The reset password flow appears to log bearer token values in debug output.

title: Refactor sidebar navigation components
body: This PR extracts duplicated sidebar item rendering into a shared component.

title: README setup command is outdated
body: The documentation still says npm install but the project requires npm ci in CI.

title: Add support for scheduled weekly reports
body: Feature request: support recurring research reports every Monday morning.

title: CI failed on pytest
body: FAILED tests/test_upload.py::test_large_file AssertionError expected 413 got 500 exit code 1
